# New Epics to Implement

## Fix storybook

You setup storybook in epic 8 but all the stories have the same error:

Cannot destructure property 'id' of 'defaultExport' as it is undefined.

You obviously did not use playwright MCP server to verify the stories were working before merging the storybook setup. Please fix the storybook setup and verify all the stories are working.

## The wait spinner is no longer centered on the screen

When I clicked the "Refresh" button in the Screener screen, the wait spinner appeared in the upper left corner of the screen instead of centered in the screen. This is probably because of the refactor to Tailwind CSS that occurred in Epic 8. You can look at the commit history to see what styles were being used before. All the wait spinners have the same issue because they all use the same code. Please fix the wait spinner so that it is centered on the screen again. Use the Tailwind CSS utilities to center the spinner both vertically and horizontally on the screen. Use the Playwright MCP server to verify that the spinner is centered on the screen.

## "Upload" input no longer looks like a button

The "Upload" input in the universe screen no longer looks like a button. It looks like a label so there is no indication that I should click it to pick a file. This is probably because of the refactor to Tailwind CSS that occurred in Epic 8. You can look at the commit history to see what styles were being used before. Please fix the styling of the "Upload" input so that it looks like a button again. Use Tailwind CSS utilities or Angular Material to style the input with a background color, padding, border radius, and hover effect to make it look like a button. Use the Playwright MCP server to verify that the "Upload" input looks like a button and has the appropriate styling.

## Tables missing in the Account screens

The account screens no longer display the tables for "Open Positions", "Sold Positions" and "Dividend Deposits". This is probably because of the refactor to Tailwind CSS that occurred in Epic 8. You can look at the commit history to see what styles were being used before. Please fix the account screens so that the tables are displayed again. Use Tailwind CSS utilities to style the tables and ensure they are visible on the screen. Use the Playwright MCP server to verify that the tables are displayed correctly on the account screens.

It should be noted that the Universe screen is still laid out correctly and the table is still visible on the screen. So the problem probably has more to do with the panel(s) that wrap the table than the table itself.

## Global Summary layout

The layout of the Global Summary screen is off. The line graph should be to the right of the summary information. The line graph is currently below the summary information. This is probably because of the refactor to Tailwind CSS that occurred in Epic 8. You can look at the commit history to see what styles were being used before.

Please fix the layout of the Global Summary screen so that the line graph is to the right of the summary information. Use Tailwind CSS utilities to create a responsive layout that places the line graph to the right of the summary information on larger screens and stacks them vertically on smaller screens. Use the Playwright MCP server to verify that the layout of the Global Summary screen is correct on different screen sizes.

## Account Summary layout

The layout of the Account Summary screen is off. The line graph should be to the right of the summary information. The line graph is currently below the summary information. This is probably because of the refactor to Tailwind CSS that occurred in Epic 8. You can look at the commit history to see what styles were being used before.

Please fix the layout of the Account Summary screen so that the line graph is to the right of the summary information. Use Tailwind CSS utilities to create a responsive layout that places the line graph to the right of the summary information on larger screens and stacks them vertically on smaller screens. Use the Playwright MCP server to verify that the layout of the Account Summary screen is correct on different screen sizes.

## Universe Position column

The "Position" column in the universe screen needs to be wider so that it can display 100,000.00, right justified without clipping the content.

It also needs to display the position with 2 decimal places and a comma as a thousands separator and be right justified.

This has been an issue since we first created this table.
